title: crataegus lassa var. lanata
intro: Crataegus lassa var. lanata is a lesser-known variety of the Crataegus lassa plant, a species of hawthorn native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to regulate cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Crataegus lassa var. lanata include reduced blood pressure, improved heart function, and enhanced immune system function. The plant can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its availability and usage may be limited due to its relatively unknown status in modern herbalism.
